title: AI and immunology.
author_string: Germain, Ronald N, Van Allen, Eliezer M, Trynka, Gosia, Tsang, John S, Grün, Dominic et al.
abstract: AI is rapidly becoming part of many aspects of daily life, with an impact that reaches all fields of research. We asked investigators to share their thoughts on how AI is changing immunology research, what is necessary to move forward, the potential and the pitfalls, and what will remain unchanged as the field journeys into a new era.
